service.title: Who are Dubplates great for?
service.p1: For DJs who want to play any track on vinyl, including unreleased music, in their vinyl-only sets.
service.p2: For every music enthusiast who just want to have any musical piece in a physical form.
service.p3: For musicians and producers who want to bring their music into physical form.

oneOff.title: ONE-OFF COPY
oneOff.desc: We cut from one-off copy to short runs

about.title: ABOUT US
about.body: We are music enthusiasts who live for records, grooves and the sound of a needle hitting wax. We cut vinyls. One-offs, dubplates, short runs. Your music, turned into a record you can actually spin. For DJs, producers, labels, anyone tired of their tracks living in a folder.

size7.title: 7" SINGLE
size7.desc: Perfect for singles, maximum music length on the side — 7 min.

size10.title: 10" EP
size10.desc: Extended play format, maximum music length on each side — 11 min.

size12.title: 12" LP
size12.desc: Full album experience, maximum music length on each side — 15 min.

Pricing.title: PRICING
Pricing.desc: Clear, straightforward pricing for high-quality dubplates.

Services.title: OUR SERVICES
Services.desc: Everything you need to press your music onto physical wax.
